title: PhysWorldLM Asset Schema
description: PhysWorldLM World Specification Asset Standard (PW-WSF-1100). Universal asset registry for simulation, rendering, AI, robotics, military logistics, digital twins, and geospatial visualization. Renderer-independent and simulator-independent.

Hash.description: Cryptographic hash of a file or content blob.

FileReference.description: Reference to a single file artifact with integrity metadata.

AssetReference.description: Lightweight reference to another asset by UUID and optional hint.

EntityReference.description: Reference to an entity in entity.schema.json / world.schema.json.

role.description: Role this entity plays relative to the asset, e.g. 'platform', 'payload'.

OrganizationReference.description: Reference to an organization in organization.schema.json.

BoundingBox.description: Axis-aligned bounding box in local asset space (meters).

BoundingSphere.description: Bounding sphere in local asset space.

LODEntry.description: Level-of-detail entry. LOD 0 is highest fidelity.

screen_size_px.description: Pixel screen size threshold to activate this LOD.

Tags.description: Arbitrary string tags for search and filtering.

embedding_ref.description: Reference to a pre-computed embedding vector store.

MonetaryValue.description: Monetary value in a specified currency.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code e.g. USD, EUR, GBP.

DocumentReference.description: Reference to a supporting document (manual, certificate, report).

MaterialSlot.description: Named material slot mapping for a mesh.

PhysicsMeta.description: Physics properties for a physical asset.

SensorProfile.description: Sensor asset profile (camera, radar, lidar, etc.).

AIMetadata.description: AI/ML model metadata for AI asset types.

SimulationMeta.description: Simulation engine compatibility and fidelity hints.

AssetIdentity.description: Core identity block for any asset.

persistent_identifier.description: DOI, ARK, Handle, or similar PID.

AssetClassification.description: Classification and type information for an asset.

AssetOwnership.description: Ownership, custody, and supply chain information.

AssetLocation.description: Physical location and basing information for the asset.

transform_ref.description: Reference to a Transform in transform.schema.json.

AssetLifecycle.description: Lifecycle dates and phases for the asset.

AssetOperationalStatus.description: Current operational status of the asset.

AssetFinancials.description: Financial and accounting data for the asset.

AssetLogistics.description: Logistics, inventory, and supply chain data.

AssetSecurity.description: Security, classification, and cyber protection properties.

AssetSource.description: Provenance and source information for the digital asset artifact.

Asset.description: Complete asset record. Represents any entity with organizational, operational, financial, or logistical value.

entity_refs.description: Simulation entities this asset corresponds to.

files.description: All file artifacts associated with this asset.

extensions.description: Vendor or domain-specific extension namespaces. Keys MUST be reverse-DNS namespace strings.

standard.description: PhysWorldLM World Specification Asset Standard identifier.

identity.name: M1A2 SEPv3 Main Battle Tank
identity.description: US Army M1A2 SEPv3 main battle tank with TUSK III and Trophy APS.

identity.name: Urban Terrain Cesium Tileset — Baghdad CDA
identity.description: High-resolution Cesium 3D Tiles of urban terrain, 0.5 m GSD.
